title: HIVE Digital Technologies Stock Forecast and Price Targets
text: Stock Analysis provides HIVE Digital Technologies forecast and price targets based on analyst consensus. The company is rated as a Strong Buy by the analyst consensus with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. HIVE's technical outlook is supported by strong fundamental metrics including revenue growth and expanding Bitcoin holdings. Key valuation metrics include price-to-book, price-to-sales, and EV/EBITDA which appear attractive given growth prospects. The company's ability to generate cash flow while scaling production positions it well for valuation expansion. Forecast models suggest revenue could exceed $300 million annually within the next 12-18 months based on Paraguay expansion completion and AI infrastructure scaling.
